title: Breaking into Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #14 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Buhy- Aaaah!!! I can't take it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're in danger too!! I'm scared!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you idiot, stop joking around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bas- tard....!! He really did it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no good, you're gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the power to do it myself....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can have your conversa-tion in peace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ... hey.....!!! is what you said true.....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I have no reason to lie...

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Oh yes... and he was worried

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: that you would be mad at him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ... the one you're always talking about...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh...? When did I start going up?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.
